targets.query:
from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "upload_diff" and r._field == "end_total")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "latest_total")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "total")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "upload_meta")
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> yield(name: "uploads")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "upload_diff" and r._field == "added_count")
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "net_added")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "upload_diff" and r._field == "end_total")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)
  |> yield(name: "total_trend")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group(columns: ["тип кластера"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> yield(name: "cluster_distribution")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group(columns: ["имя солюшена"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> yield(name: "solution_distribution")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group(columns: ["имя солюшена", "версия солюшен"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count"})
  |> sort(columns: ["count"], desc: true)
  |> yield(name: "version_breakdown")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group(columns: ["тип стенда"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> yield(name: "stand_distribution")
